title: billing.event
description: K-11 billing event — one row per (enterprise_id, billing_month) with the unique-customer count delta. Topic predates the kaori.* prefix convention; renaming would be a breaking change so the old name stays. Producer: TBD (F-031 cron + future quota-alert path).

record_count.description: DISTINCT customer_external_id count for the period (K-11 unit). Aggregator may emit deltas (positive/negative) when re-aggregating; consumer treats as authoritative for the month.
